name: TradeStation
description_short: Advanced trading platform with powerful EasyLanguage strategy development, backtesting, and automated execution.
description_long:
TradeStation is a veteran platform known for its powerful strategy development and automated trading capabilities. The EasyLanguage programming environment allows traders to code custom indicators, strategies, and automated trading systems with relatively minimal programming experience.

The platform offers commission-free stock and ETF trading, with competitive pricing for options ($0.60/contract) and futures ($1.50/contract). TradeStation's real strength is in its backtesting and strategy optimization engine, which lets traders test their ideas against years of historical data before risking real capital.

TradeStation supports stocks, options, futures, forex, and crypto, making it a versatile choice for multi-asset traders. The platform is available as a desktop application, web platform, and mobile app, though the desktop version provides the most complete feature set.
cons: Desktop platform feels dated compared to modern competitors
Data fees can add up for real-time futures data
